race.description: Bong Bong Picnic Race Club Cg&E Mdn Plate
race.comment: Plenty of in-form runners come together. CRUNCH (11) settled worse than midfield then went through his gears nicely to be beaten just over a length on debut last start. Will appreciate the extra 100m today and with some race smarts now on board he looks the testing material. FLYING ARTISAM (6) returned from a lengthy spell with an impressive second last time out in the same race as CRUNCH, beaten narrowly after racing on the speed. Will need to do a bit of work from a wide alley but he is a great chance to go one better. COPARTNER PEGASUS (2) stormed home when clear to be beaten a head when second-up over 1350m at Wyong a month ago. Kept fresh and will be tough to hold out. DEMMO DERMY (3) is very fit and from a nice draw can run another bold race.
